message:
chore(ci): regenerate gate reports after source changes

Refresh timestamps across all 16 CI gate report artifacts following the
extensions resilience refactor and HTTP timeout hardening. Gate verdicts,
pass/fail statuses, bead references, and all substantive content are
unchanged -- only generated_at, ts, run_id, and correlation_id fields
are updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
